docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UWE EMERSON NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION DENIED. THE COURT MUST APPLY A STRONG PRESUMPTION OF CORRECTNESS TO THE AGENCY'S FINDINGS AND DECISION. (FUKUDA VS. CITY OF ANGELS (1999) 20 CAL.4TH 805.) PETITIONER FAILS TO SATISFY HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE AGENCY'S DECISION WAS CONTRARY TO THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE, AS LAUFER'S TESTIMONY IS LARGELY UNRELIABLE. ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER UWE EMERSON Notice of Hearing on Petition For Writ Of Mandate. Appearances: Sara Zalkin, Esq. & Shari Lynn White, Esq. of Pier 5 Law Offices, appearing for Petitioners and Moving party; David A. Carrillo, Esq. & Rebecca Licht, Esq. of the Dept. of Motor Vehicles, State of California appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Counsel for Petitioner failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied. The court must apply a strong presumption of correctness to the agency's findings and decision. (Fukuda vs. City of Angels (1999) 20 Cal.4th 805.) Petitioner fails to satisfy his burden of proof that the agency's decision was contrary to the weight of the evidence, as Laufer's testimony is largely unreliable. Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
